aio.response_text:
香港迪士尼樂園門票採分級制，一日成人門票價格約港幣$5 0 1 至$7 0 4 （第1-4級）。香港居民享「快樂同遊」優惠（2人同行75折），[Klook](https://www.klook.com/zh-HK/activity/39-hong-kong-disneyland-resort-hong-kong/)、[KKday](https://www.kkday.com/zh-hk/product/2301-hong-kong-disneyland-ticket)、[Trip.com](https://hk.trip.com/guide/attraction/%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8.html) 經常有購票優惠（例如連餐券套餐）。建議入園前於[迪士尼官網日曆](https://www.hongkongdisneyland.com/zh-hk/new-day-calendar/) 確認等級並預約。[[1]](https://www.hongkongdisneyland.com/zh-hk/offers-discounts/advance-purchase-ticket-deal/#:~:text=%E6%96%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%923%E5%A4%A9%E5%89%8D%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E4%BA%AB%E6%AD%A3%E5%83%B91%E6%97%A5%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A875%E6%8A%98%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%EF%BC%81%E4%BA%8C%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E7%AF%80%E7%9C%81%E9%AB%98%E9%81%94%E6%B8%AF%E5%B9%A3$470*%EF%BC%81%20%E7%AB%8B%E5%8D%B3%E7%B4%84%E5%AE%9A%E8%A6%AA%E6%9C%8B%E5%A5%BD%E5%8F%8B%E6%9A%A2%E7%8E%A920%E5%91%A8%E5%B9%B4%E6%85%B6%E5%85%B8%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%AB%E3%80%8C%E5%BF%AB%E6%A8%82%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E3%80%8D%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E9%A0%90%E8%A8%82%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%23%E3%80%82%E6%96%BC2026%E5%B9%B41%E6%9C%8824%E6%97%A5%E8%87%B35%E6%9C%883%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F%E9%96%93%E9%81%B8%E5%AE%9A%E6%97%A5%E5%AD%90%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%92%EF%BC%8C%E4%BA%8C%E4%BA%BA%E6%88%96%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8A%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E5%8F%AF%E4%BA%AB%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A875%E6%8A%98%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0-%20%E5%9B%9B%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E7%AF%80%E7%9C%81%E9%81%94%E6%B8%AF%E5%B9%A3$940%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E5%8A%A0%E5%BF%AB%E6%A8%82%EF%BC%81%E9%82%84%E6%9C%89%E9%A1%8D%E5%A4%96%E9%A4%90%E9%A3%B2%E5%8F%8A%E5%95%86%E5%93%81%E6%8A%98%E6%89%A3%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%E5%88%B8%5E%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B3%E5%88%BB%E7%B5%84%E5%9C%98%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%92%E7%8E%A9%EF%BC%81%20%5E%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%8C%85%E6%8B%AC%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8B%E5%9C%92%E5%85%A7%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%EF%BC%9A.)[[2]](https://tw.trip.com/guide/attraction/%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E6%A8%82%E5%9C%92%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8.html#:~:text=Table_title:%20%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E6%A8%82%E5%9C%92%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%20Table_content:%20header:%20%7C%20%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%20%7C,%E6%88%90%E4%BA%BA12~60%20%E6%AD%B2%20%7C%20%E7%A5%A8%E5%83%B9%28TWD%29:%20$3%2C409%20%E8%B5%B7%20%7C)[[3]](https://www.moneyhero.com.hk/zh/credit-card/blog/%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF-%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8-%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%E6%AF%94%E8%BC%83-%E9%82%8A%E5%88%B0%E8%B2%B7%E5%85%A5%E5%A0%B4%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E6%9C%80%E5%B9%B3#:~:text=%E6%8C%89%E6%AD%A4%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7%20*%202%E6%97%A5%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%83%B9%E9%8C%A2%EF%BC%9A%E6%88%90%E4%BA%BAHK$1132%E3%80%81%E5%B0%8F%E7%AB%A5HK$849%EF%BC%883%E8%87%B311%E6%AD%B2%EF%BC%89%E3%80%81%E9%95%B7%E8%80%85HK$849%EF%BC%8865%E6%AD%B2%E6%88%96%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8A%EF%BC%89%20*%20Klook%202%E6%97%A5%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%EF%BC%9A%E6%88%90%E4%BA%BAHK$958%E8%B5%B7%EF%BC%8F%E5%B0%8F%E7%AB%A5HK$729%E8%B5%B7%20%E6%8C%89%E6%AD%A4%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7)[[4]](https://www.kkday.com/zh-hk/product/2301-hong-kong-disneyland-ticket)[[5]](https://www.hongkongdisneyland.com/zh-hk/new-day-calendar/#:~:text=%E6%9F%A5%E6%89%BE%E9%85%92%E5%BA%97%E9%A0%90%E8%A8%82%E5%8F%8A%E8%A8%88%E5%8A%83%E6%97%85%E7%A8%8B%20*%20%E9%81%8A%E6%A8%82%E8%A8%AD%E6%96%BD%20*%20%E7%8F%BE%E5%A0%B4%E5%A8%9B%E6%A8%82%E8%A1%A8%E6%BC%94%20*%20%E8%88%87%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E6%9C%8B%E5%8F%8B%E8%A6%8B%E9%9D%A2)

香港迪士尼門票最新資訊（2026年4月）

- **門票等級與票價 (1日門票)**:
	- **第1級別（最便宜）：** 標準成人 HK$501 / 小童及長者 HK$374
	- **第4級別（最繁忙）：** 標準成人 HK$704 / 小童及長者 HK$528
- **熱門購票優惠平台**:
	- **Klook：** 成人1日票約 HK$600起，2日票優惠成人約 HK$958起。
	- **KKday：** 通常有特別連餐券套餐，且使用折扣碼（如HKDL4HK）可減HK$40。
	- **Trip.com：** 基本1日票成人約 HK$610起。
- **奇妙處處通（年票）**:
	- 白金卡：約 HK$4,998 (全年通行，無限次)。
	- 金卡：約 HK$2,748 (平日+假日)。
	- 銀卡：約 HK$1,568 (工作日)。
- **特別加購** : 快速通行「迪士尼尊享卡」(Disney Premier Access) 可縮短排隊時間，有3項/8項設施通行證等選擇。[[1]](https://www.hongkongdisneyland.com/zh-hk/offers-discounts/advance-purchase-ticket-deal/#:~:text=%E6%96%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%923%E5%A4%A9%E5%89%8D%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AF%E4%BA%AB%E6%AD%A3%E5%83%B91%E6%97%A5%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A875%E6%8A%98%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%EF%BC%81%E4%BA%8C%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E7%AF%80%E7%9C%81%E9%AB%98%E9%81%94%E6%B8%AF%E5%B9%A3$470*%EF%BC%81%20%E7%AB%8B%E5%8D%B3%E7%B4%84%E5%AE%9A%E8%A6%AA%E6%9C%8B%E5%A5%BD%E5%8F%8B%E6%9A%A2%E7%8E%A920%E5%91%A8%E5%B9%B4%E6%85%B6%E5%85%B8%EF%BC%8C%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%AB%E3%80%8C%E5%BF%AB%E6%A8%82%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E3%80%8D%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E9%A0%90%E8%A8%82%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%23%E3%80%82%E6%96%BC2026%E5%B9%B41%E6%9C%8824%E6%97%A5%E8%87%B35%E6%9C%883%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F%E9%96%93%E9%81%B8%E5%AE%9A%E6%97%A5%E5%AD%90%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%92%EF%BC%8C%E4%BA%8C%E4%BA%BA%E6%88%96%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8A%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E5%8F%AF%E4%BA%AB%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A875%E6%8A%98%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0-%20%E5%9B%9B%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%E7%AF%80%E7%9C%81%E9%81%94%E6%B8%AF%E5%B9%A3$940%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8C%E9%81%8A%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%9A%E5%8A%A0%E5%BF%AB%E6%A8%82%EF%BC%81%E9%82%84%E6%9C%89%E9%A1%8D%E5%A4%96%E9%A4%90%E9%A3%B2%E5%8F%8A%E5%95%86%E5%93%81%E6%8A%98%E6%89%A3%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%E5%88%B8%5E%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B3%E5%88%BB%E7%B5%84%E5%9C%98%E5%85%A5%E5%9C%92%E7%8E%A9%EF%BC%81%20%5E%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%8C%85%E6%8B%AC%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8B%E5%9C%92%E5%85%A7%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%EF%BC%9A.)[[2]](https://www.moneyhero.com.hk/zh/credit-card/blog/%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF-%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8-%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%E6%AF%94%E8%BC%83-%E9%82%8A%E5%88%B0%E8%B2%B7%E5%85%A5%E5%A0%B4%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E6%9C%80%E5%B9%B3#:~:text=%E6%8C%89%E6%AD%A4%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7%20*%202%E6%97%A5%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%83%B9%E9%8C%A2%EF%BC%9A%E6%88%90%E4%BA%BAHK$1132%E3%80%81%E5%B0%8F%E7%AB%A5HK$849%EF%BC%883%E8%87%B311%E6%AD%B2%EF%BC%89%E3%80%81%E9%95%B7%E8%80%85HK$849%EF%BC%8865%E6%AD%B2%E6%88%96%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8A%EF%BC%89%20*%20Klook%202%E6%97%A5%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%84%AA%E6%83%A0%EF%BC%9A%E6%88%90%E4%BA%BAHK$958%E8%B5%B7%EF%BC%8F%E5%B0%8F%E7%AB%A5HK$729%E8%B5%B7%20%E6%8C%89%E6%AD%A4%E8%B3%BC%E8%B2%B7)[[3]](https://www.klook.com/zh-HK/activity/39-hong-kong-disneyland-resort-hong-kong/)[[4]](https://www.kkday.com/zh-hk/product/2301-hong-kong-disneyland-ticket)[[5]](https://hk.trip.com/guide/attraction/%E9%A6%99%E6%B8%AF%E8%BF%AA%E5%A3%AB%E5%B0%BC%E9%96%80%E7%A5%A8.html)[[6]](https://www.hongkongdisneyland.com/zh-hk/magic-access/benefits/)

**建議事項：** 門票採實名制，請務必先在 香港迪士尼官方網站 查詢門票級別與預約入園日子。
